# Presale With Uzair

> Fraser Valley's leading buyer-only presale expert. Uzair Muhammad helps first-time buyers and investors secure new-construction condos and townhomes across Surrey, Langley, Abbotsford, Coquitlam, Delta, Burnaby, Chilliwack, and Maple Ridge — with VIP developer access, line-by-line contract review, and no developer bias.

Independent, buyer-only representation across BC's Fraser Valley and Metro Vancouver. 450+ units sold, $200M+ in sales volume, 5 years in the presale market, 4.9★ Google rating. Available in English, Punjabi, Hindi, and Urdu. Contact Uzair: +1 778-231-3592.

## Core pages

- [Home](/): Fraser Valley's buyer-only presale expert — VIP access, best pricing, contract protection.
- [About](/about): Uzair Muhammad's background, track record, and buyer-protection approach.
- [Services](/services): Buyer representation, contract review, and presale advisory.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch by phone, email, or office visit in Surrey, BC.
- [Book a Call](/call): Schedule a free 1-on-1 presale strategy call.
- [Presale Guide](/presale-guide): Free guide — 7 costly mistakes presale buyers make.
- [Blog](/blog): Market insights, presale tips, and buyer education.

## SEO / AEO funnel pages (first-person, buyer-only)

- [New to Presale? Start Here](/new-to-presale-start-here): Uzair's plain-English intro — what a presale is, presale vs resale, is it right for a first home.
- [How to Buy a Presale in the Fraser Valley](/buy-presale-fraser-valley): Step-by-step — deposits, 7-day rescission, GST, when to call Uzair (before the sales centre).
- [Presale Mistakes I See Fraser Valley Buyers Make](/presale-mistakes-fraser-valley): Registering with the developer first, skipping the disclosure statement, bad floor plans, no exit plan.
- [Fraser Valley Presale Investment Advice](/fraser-valley-presale-investment-advice): Uzair's honest take — which cities and unit types, rental demand, assignment/exit, when NOT to buy.
- [Best Presale Realtor in the Fraser Valley](/best-presale-realtor-fraser-valley): Talk to Uzair before any developer. Track record, buyer-only, languages, service area.
- [Do You Need Your Own Realtor for a Presale?](/buyer-representation-presale-fraser-valley): The $0-cost buyer-representation thesis — who the sales rep really works for.
- [First-Time Buyers Fraser Valley](/first-time-buyers-fraser-valley): How presale + new construction helps first-timers lock today's price and stack the GST rebate and PTT newly-built exemption.
- [Investors Fraser Valley](/investors-fraser-valley): Cash-flow (Abbotsford) vs appreciation (Surrey-Langley SkyTrain corridor), assignments, and BC's 2025 flipping tax.
- [How I Help](/how-i-help): Every presale and new-construction scenario Uzair handles — first-timers, investors, upsizers, detached, assignments, VIP access, contract review.
